expectations.text: Phase 0: uuidgen으로 short-id 생성 및 state directory 생성
expectations.evidence: Trace shows Bash(uuidgen | tr ... | cut -c1-8) and mkdir -p ~/.prism/state/analyze-{short-id}/ in Phase 0.2
Trace confirms subagent_type=oh-my-claudecode:architect, model=opus matching seed-analyst.md lines 4,9

expectations.text: Phase 0.5: seed-analysis.json에 severity, status, dimensions, research 필드 모두 포함
expectations.evidence: Expected output shows all required fields with correct types (SEV2, Active, dimensions object, research object with findings/files_examined/mcp_queries/recent_changes)

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: perspective-generator가 seed-analysis.json을 읽고 dimensions.complexity로 perspective 수 결정
expectations.evidence: Trace shows complexity=single-cause -> 2-3 perspectives scaling rule applied, resulting in 3 perspectives (root-cause, performance, deployment)

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: perspectives.json의 각 perspective에 id, name, scope, key_questions, model, agent_type, rationale 필드 존재
expectations.evidence: Trace shows complete perspective objects with all 7 required fields for each of 3 perspectives

expectations.text: Phase 0.55: perspectives.json에 rules_applied 필드가 있고 core_archetype_included=true
expectations.evidence: Trace shows rules_applied with all 5 mandatory rule checks documented

expectations.text: Phase 0.6: AskUserQuestion으로 perspective 승인 요청 후 perspectives.json에 approved=true 추가
expectations.evidence: Trace shows AskUserQuestion with header 'Perspectives' and options, then perspectives.json update with approved:true and user_modifications:[]

expectations.text: Phase 0.7: ontology scope mapping 실행 (prism_docs_roots 호출 시도)
expectations.evidence: Trace shows ToolSearch('select:mcp__prism-mcp__prism_docs_roots') followed by mcp__prism-mcp__prism_docs_roots() call with optional fallback handling

expectations.text: Phase 0.8: context.json에 research_summary가 seed-analysis.json의 research 데이터를 반영
expectations.evidence: Trace shows context.json with research_summary containing key_findings, files_examined, dimensions sourced from seed-analysis.json

expectations.text: Phase 1: perspectives.json의 각 perspective.model과 agent_type이 spawn 파라미터에 그대로 사용됨
expectations.evidence: Trace verifies root-cause(opus/architect), performance(sonnet/architect-medium), deployment(sonnet/architect-medium) all consistent with archetype table

expectations.text: Phase 1: analyst 프롬프트에 context.json의 summary가 {CONTEXT}로, ontology-scope.json이 {ONTOLOGY_SCOPE}로 주입됨
expectations.evidence: Trace confirms SKILL.md line 319-320 placeholder replacements sourced from context.json and ontology-scope.json Phase B text block

expectations.text: Phase 1: 분석가가 finding-protocol.md 기반으로 spawn (verification-protocol 아님)
expectations.evidence: Trace shows prompt assembly: [worker preamble] + [archetype prompt] + [finding-protocol.md], NOT verification-protocol.md

expectations.text: Phase 1: 각 analyst가 perspectives/{perspective-id}/findings.json에 analyst, findings[] 필드 작성
expectations.evidence: Trace shows findings path ~/.prism/state/analyze-{short-id}/perspectives/{perspective-id}/findings.json with analyst and findings[] array

expectations.text: Phase 2A: finding 분석가 shutdown 후 TaskOutput으로 drain
expectations.evidence: Trace shows SendMessage(shutdown_request) to each analyst followed by TaskList -> TaskOutput drain pattern

expectations.text: Phase 2B: verifier가 findings.json을 읽은 후 prism_interview 실행
expectations.evidence: Trace shows verification-protocol.md Step 1 (Read findings.json) -> Step 2 (prism_interview start) -> Step 3 (answer loop)
Trace shows Step 2B.5: Write verified-findings-{perspective-id}.md for each analyst perspective

expectations.text: Phase 2B: analyst-findings.md에 모든 perspective의 검증 결과 통합
expectations.evidence: Trace shows Step 2B.6: Compile all verified findings into analyst-findings.md with verification scores summary table

expectations.text: Phase 3: report.md 템플릿의 모든 섹션이 analyst-findings.md 기반으로 채워짐
expectations.evidence: Trace shows Phase 3 reads analyst-findings.md + templates/report.md and fills all sections. Minor note: report_language field exists but not explicitly consumed (ISSUE found)
